query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_cost_centers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  cost_center_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_user_cc_user_id (user_id),
  INDEX idx_user_cc_cost_center_id (cost_center_id),
  INDEX idx_user_cc_unique (user_id, cost_center_id),
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (cost_center_id) REFERENCES cost_centers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
);
